label: 高度图拉伸
description: 将高度图每个格子的值乘以拉伸系数，等比例放大或压缩高度信息
description-en: Multiplies every cell of a height grid by a stretch factor, scaling height values proportionally.
icon: 左右两张网格对比，左侧矮平，右侧被竖向拉伸成高峰，中间一个向上箭头，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: stretchFactor
inputs.label: 拉伸系数
inputs.description: 高度值等比例缩放系数，正数；大于1放大，小于1压缩，等于1原样输出
inputs.description-en: Proportional scale factor for height values; >1 amplifies, <1 compresses, 1 = passthrough.

outputs.name: outputGrid
outputs.label: 输出高度图
outputs.description: 拉伸后的整数高度网格，每格值为原值乘以拉伸系数后四舍五入
outputs.description-en: Stretched integer height grid; each cell is the original value multiplied by stretchFactor, rounded.
